channel.title: ByoGPT on Tech Blog
channel.description: Recent content in ByoGPT on Tech Blog

item.title: [Artificial Intelligence] Running LLaMA server in local machine
item.description: Referencing the previous post, we will run a web server which aims to act as a drop-in replacement for the OpenAI API, which can in turn be used by byogpt. Preparation (3 mins) Pipenv aims to help users manage environments, dependencies and imported packages and I will be using it in this guide. pip install pipenv uvicorn fastapi sse_starlette pipenv shell This is the command to install the server: CMAKE_ARGS="-DLLAMA_BLAS=ON -DLLAMA_BLAS_VENDOR=OpenBLAS" pip install llama-cpp-python==0.

item.title: [Front End] Developing BYO-GPT with Flutter
item.description: Developing a user-friendly interface to converse with ChatGPT via OpenAI’s API with your own openAI API token. Developing BYO-GPT with Flutter (Total Setup Time: 10 mins) In this post, I will develop a “Bring Your Own - Generative Pre-Trained Transformer”, a user-friendly interface to converse with ChatGPT via OpenAI’s API with Flutter. You may download BYO-GPT and check it out! Installing Flutter and IDE (4 mins) You may download the latest Flutter SDK and follow the installation guide and update your path.
